overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, a large circular digital billboard, and pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a futuristic urban plaza with wet reflective surfaces and atmospheric haze.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway next to a building with concrete stairs and ledges

notable_agents.action: walking with a red illuminated umbrella, passing by the camera

modern commercial building with covered walkway and neon signage

overhanging roof providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a covered walkway beside a modern commercial building with distinctive concrete stairs. The camera moves forward under shelter from the heavy rain, approaching a large circular digital billboard visible in the distance. A pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with circular digital monument

events.description: exits covered walkway into the open rainy plaza, becoming fully exposed to the weather

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while passing pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: walking with a purple illuminated umbrella moving across the plaza
person wearing a bright yellow reflective jacket walking ahead

entered.detail: tall red dual-arm street lamp with bright white lights
row of parked vehicles along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the sheltered walkway into the open plaza, becoming exposed to the heavy rain. The circular digital billboard moves closer to the center of view while pedestrians with neon umbrellas and reflective clothing pass by. Street lamps and parked cars become visible on the right side as the building on the left recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with parking area and neon city skyline

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward, focusing more on the distant towers

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza while approaching the parking area and city skyline

entered.detail: police department building with illuminated signage and modern facade

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the camera passes the circular billboard which now sits to the left. The NCPD building becomes visible on the right side while the distant neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline. The left building has completely exited the frame as the camera advances toward the parking area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge near street with police station and commercial buildings

events.description: approaching the NCPD building facade and transitioning to the street level area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the right side of the plaza near the NCPD building, observing the distant skyline

entered.detail: flying cars visible in the sky between the skyscrapers
low-rise commercial building with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the street level near the NCPD building, with flying vehicles visible in the sky between the distant towers. The camera moves past street lamps and parked cars while the commercial building on the right comes into clearer view. The circular billboard remains visible in the far left background as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a wide, rain-drenched cyberpunk plaza dominated by neon lights. It begins under the cover of a modern commercial building, moving past concrete stairs and a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella toward a distant circular digital billboard. As the camera exits the shelter and enters the open plaza, the heavy rain becomes immersive while the billboard centers in the frame and pedestrians with neon umbrellas drift past. The scene then expands as the camera passes the billboard to the left, revealing the NCPD building on the right and a skyline of towering, neon-lit skyscrapers. Finally, the movement advances toward the street level, passing parked cars and street lamps while flying vehicles glide between the distant towers under the persistent rainfall.
